codeReview.summary: The commit cleanly wraps the three treasury read routes in the repository's existing data/meta envelope contract and updates compare-coingecko assertions accordingly. The feature stays narrowly scoped, preserves existing fixture metadata, and remains consistent with the app-level treasury contract already exercised elsewhere in the repository.

summary: Pass. Reviewed the feature metadata, handoff, transcript skeleton, commit 4bbd419 diff, and relevant treasury/app comparison tests; the change is scoped to the intended envelope cleanup and does not introduce contract drift or missing coverage relative to the repo's treasury contract.
